title: Israel approves National AI Plan to strengthen technological self
description: The Israeli government approved on Tuesday a national plan to accelerate artificial intelligence development, with the goal of positioning Israel as a global leader in the field.
content:
Tel Aviv [Israel], June 17 (ANI/TPS): The Israeli government has approved a national plan to accelerate artificial intelligence development, with the goal of positioning Israel as a global leader in the field.

title: SpaceX IPO success shines spotlight on convergence of satellites, connectivity and AI: Nomura
description: The successful public listing of SpaceX has brought renewed investor focus to the convergence of satellites, connectivity services and artificial intelligence (AI), with brokerage Nomura describing the company as uniquely positioned at the intersection of all three high-growth sectors.
content: New Delhi [India], June 17 (ANI): In an anchor report titled "Fusion of satellites, connectivity, and AI", Nomura said SpaceX has emerged as the dominant force in the global satellite ecosystem and is building an integrated platform that links space ... [3260 chars]

title: Publicis chief urges France, Germany to lead European AI fund
description: Publicis chairman Maurice Lévy on Wednesday called ​on France and Germany to lead a pan-European ​artificial intelligence fund, saying the bloc's companies were ⁠too exposed to U.S. providers that could cut ​access to advanced AI models without warning.
content: Speaking at VivaTech ​in Paris, Lévy said Europe needed a 100 billion euro ($115 billion) fund to back artificial intelligence across the continent, describing it ​as a response to what he said was ​the shock of seeing European companies lose access ... [1322 chars]

title: India among Asia-Pacific's most AI-ready healthcare markets as demand for coordinated care rises: Bain
description: India is emerging as one of the most AI-ready healthcare markets in the Asia-Pacific region, with a growing number of consumers using generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) to understand diagnoses, navigate the healthcare system and prepare for medical appointments, according to a new report by global consultancy Bain & Company.

content:

title: G7 Summit 2026 Live: PM Modi to hold talks with Trump, EU leaders on final day in France
description:
G7 Summit 2026 in France Live Updates: The G7 Summit in Evian enters its final day with Prime Minister Narendra Modi set for a packed schedule, including a bilateral meeting with US President Donald Trump, talks with German leaders, and a trilateral engagement with European Council President António Costa and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen. Modi will also participate in sessions on inclusive economic growth and the safe deployment of artificial intelligence.
The summit concludes amid global attention on the recently announced US-Iran agreement, which Trump has promoted as a framework to prevent Tehran from acquiring a nuclear weapon. As leaders of the world's major economies hold their final discussions on growth, technology and global security, the Modi-Trump meeting is expected to be among the day's most closely watched engagements. Follow indiatoday.in for all the latest developments from Evian.
content:
G7 leaders on Wednesday reaffirmed their commitment to a free and open Indo-Pacific based on the rule of law, while voicing opposition to any unilateral attempts to alter the status quo by force or coercion, particularly across the Taiwan Strait.
